creation_time.description: Timestamp indicating when the DNS zone was created

effective_labels.description: Final set of labels applied to the DNS zone for resource organization

id.description: Unique identifier for the DNS zone used in configurations

managed_zone_id.description: System-assigned ID for the managed DNS zone in Google Cloud

name_servers.description: List of DNS servers used to resolve queries for the zone

terraform_labels.description: Labels defined in Terraform for tagging the DNS zone
